feat.name: Essence Overflow
feat.text:
Uncontainable power explodes from your spectral dragon. Your Channel Draconic Essence ends, and all creatures (except you) in a 10-foot emanation from your spectral dragon take 6d6 damage with a basic Reflex save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. The damage’s type matches the breath of your draconic benefactor. You then can’t use Essence Overflow again for 1d4 rounds.  
  
At 8th level and every 2 levels thereafter, the damage increases by 1d6.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.
